name: SK-II Facial Treatment Essence
pros: Pitera-rich formula is genuinely hydrating and noticeably improves skin texture
Multiple sizes (75ml, 160ml, 230ml) suit different budgets and commitment levels
Japan's #1 essence—easy to find, refill anywhere, great for expats staying long-term
cons: ¥12,650 entry price is high; requires consistent use to justify cost
Fragrance-forward formula may feel cloying to those preferring unscented toners
shortDescription: Japan's cult essence with Pitera—hydrating, restorative, genuinely effective.
review: SK-II's Facial Treatment Essence is the most-reviewed skincare product in Japan for good reason. The fermented Pitera ingredient delivers visible hydration and smoothness within weeks. At ¥12,650, it's pricey, but the 230ml size offers better value. Foreigners should know: this is easy to repurchase at any convenience store or major retailer, and the glass bottle is refillable—a major plus if you're staying in Japan long-term.
